OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

CONNECTOR_UPDATE_EXISTING_DATA.description: Whether to update data already ingested into the platform.

ZEROFOX_USERNAME.description: The username used to authenticate against the ZeroFox API.

ZEROFOX_PASSWORD.description: The password used to authenticate against the ZeroFox API.

ZEROFOX_FIRST_RUN.description: Start date to look back on the connector's very first run (ISO 8601 format, absolute date or duration, e.g. '2023-10-01' or 'P1D').

ZEROFOX_COLLECTORS.description: Comma-separated list of ZeroFox CTI feeds to collect. When unset, all available feeds are collected.Available values are:  'c2-domains', 'exploits', 'malware', 'phishing', 'scanned_after', 'ransomware', 'vulnerabilities', 'botnet'.
